text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Arima Kinen arrives. Vodka's rival,
Daiwa Scarlet, is enthusiastic to be number one in
both position and popularity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, Vodka wonders how cool it
really is to continue competing with Daiwa Scarlet
and simply chase after strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, mulling over things forever is
unquestionably lame. She pulls herself together
and gets ready for the last race of the year: the
Arima Kinen.
